brief_notes: Elegant dual-color two-photon imaging study with clear experimental logic. Tables provide specific decoding accuracies, correlation values with CIs, congruency ANOVA results, and modality selectivity percentages. The contrast between AC (non-topographic auditory) and V2L (retinotopic visual) inputs is well-demonstrated. The audiovisual congruency null result is properly reported with full ANOVA statistics. Methods are concise but sufficient. Strong overall presentation with quantitative rigor.
